scripts.dev: concurrently -n ui,ws -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter ai-powered-canvas dev" "pnpm --filter collab-server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter ai-powered-canvas build && pnpm --filter collab-server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter ai-powered-canvas typecheck && pnpm --filter collab-server typecheck
